message:
feat(tests): add proptest suite for swarm work queue DAG invariants (ft-3681t.3.3.1)

11 property-based tests covering:
- DAG invariants (blocked items stay blocked until deps complete)
- Cycle rejection (self-loops always detected)
- Priority ordering (pull returns lowest-numbered priority)
- Batch enqueue (internal dep resolution)
- Stats consistency (stats reflect actual queue state)
- Snapshot/restore roundtrip
- Beads JSONL roundtrip integrity
- Terminal bead filtering (closed/cancelled not imported)
- Status mapping totality
- Duplicate rejection
- Complete preconditions (only in-progress items)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
